violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the coffee dispenser have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025

The floor under equipment in the kitchen has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/14/2025
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2025
The hand sink hot water faucet is in poor repair. The faucet must be fixed to eliminate leaking. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2024
The floor in the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025
